title: Street Scene
content:
No open barge
        crowded with nameless waifs
        or junks in a teeming harbour
         - just odours spilling from
        a back alley,
        stair wells littered with cheap saki
        bottles, one propped
        to rifle the door.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Street Scene", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
